_note: One-off recording for u1 sources Extension #3 (FD L6.9). Tests must NOT re-fetch — they replay this body via httpx.MockTransport. Re-record only when the live feed structure changes; document the change in aidlc-docs/audit.md. CNBC US Top News feed is RSS 2.0; <pubDate> is RFC 822 with 'GMT' zone (e.g. 'Fri, 01 May 2026 14:29:59 GMT') which parsedate_to_datetime treats as +0000 / UTC. Multiple namespaces declared at the <rss> root: xmlns:metadata="http://search.cnbc.com/rss/2.0/modules/siteContentMetadata", xmlns:atom, xmlns:content. Each <item> carries <metadata:type>, <metadata:id>, <metadata:sponsored> children — per FD L6.9 the adapter MUST ignore ALL namespace-prefixed elements (NO 'metadata:*' / 'atom:*' / 'content:*' keys in raw_metadata). The CNBC feed has NO <creator> / <dc:creator> element on any item — missing-creator is the always-case for this source (per FD L6.9 documented as spec-correct, not a bug). <description> is CDATA-wrapped plain English text, occasionally with embedded HTML; strip_html removes any markup. Recorder UA 'investo-fixture-recorder@example.com' is for fixture-provenance audit only — the production adapter sends NO custom UA (R14 does NOT apply to this source).
